name: Feature request

<!-- Please search existing issues and discussions first. -->

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that kotoji doesn't (or doesn't easily) let you do
today? Describe the use case rather than a pre-decided solution.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Scope / area

<!-- e.g. data plane / control API / Monaco editor / MCP / auth / GitHub mirror / deploy & compose / docs -->

## Additional context

Mockups, links, related issues, or anything else.
